allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''content/locations.json'', ''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Location keys:'', Object.keys\(data\).sort\(\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Total locations:'', Object.keys\(data\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const npcs = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''content/npcs.json'', ''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''NPCs:'', Object.keys\(npcs\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Total NPCs:'', Object.keys\(npcs\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const inv = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''content/investigations.json'', ''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Investigations:'', Object.keys\(inv\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Total investigations:'', Object.keys\(inv\).length\); for\(const [id, i] of Object.entries\(inv\)\) { console.log\(id, ''- steps:'', i.steps.length, ''- has choice:'', !!i.choice\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const inv = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''content/investigations.json'', ''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Investigations:'', Object.keys\(inv\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Total investigations:'', Object.keys\(inv\).length\); for\(const [id, i] of Object.entries\(inv\)\) { console.log\(id, ''- steps:'', i.steps.length, ''- has choice:'', \(i.choice ? ''yes'' : ''no''\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const frags = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''content/fragments.json'', ''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Fragments:'', Object.keys\(frags\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Total fragments:'', Object.keys\(frags\).length\);")
